title: Better Crosshair Indicator
description: This mod causes the crosshair to display differently when you can hit a player's hitbox. It is possible to change the color and size of the crosshair indicator.
body:
> # How does it work?

Better Crosshair Indicator displays visual markers around your crosshair when aiming at other players. this mod provides clear, centered feedback directly on your crosshair.

The indicator appears as four corner brackets that frame your crosshair.

## How does it differ from the original version?

> ### Visual customization
- RGBA color control
- Adjustable indicator size

> ### Advanced
- Per-corner offsets - Each corner (Top-Left, Top-Right, Bottom-Left, Bottom-Right) can be positioned independently with X/Y offsets
- (Mostly) Pixel-perfect alignment for any crosshair style
- Bind you can customize this in the keybinds settings (Default G)

> ### If you like my work, give it a ❤ it helps


> ### Original project

[CrosshairIndicator](https://modrinth.com/mod/crosshair-indicator) by [MGC8](https://modrinth.com/user/MGC8)

Thanks to @Regenitive for supporting project
